title: Request an appointment on a closed day
goal: Insist on coming in this Sunday at 10am for a checkup.
hypothesis: Does the agent validate office hours, or will it confirm a Sunday slot when the practice is closed on weekends?
opening_line: Hey, can I come in this Sunday at 10am? Sunday is really the only day that works for me.
edge_behavior: Be friendly but persistent about Sunday specifically. If the agent offers a weekday, gently push once more for Sunday to see whether it will incorrectly confirm a closed-day appointment.
wrap_up_when: the agent either confirms a Sunday time (a likely bug) or clearly explains the office is closed weekends and offers an alternative
